rationale: Review 1's approve is sound: all new names (finrank_adjoin_simple_eq_two_of_sq_mem_notMem, finrank_sup_adjoin_simple_eq_mul_two, finrank_restrictScalars_eq, finrank_sqrtTower, etc.) are consistent with adjacent style in the diff and Mathlib patterns. Review 2's requested renames/inlining are purely stylistic preference where reasonable maintainers disagree, so acting on it forces needless edits that do not improve the merged PR.
